pages.text:
Synthetic OCR Packet

Emergency Department Visit

Date: 2025-04-04

Patient reports neck pain and low back pain after motor vehicle collision.
Cervical spine tenderness documented.

Lumbar spine tenderness documented.

Discharged same day with follow-up instructions.

Synthetic OCR Packet

Radiology Report

Date: 2025-04-04

XR Cervical Spine: no acute fracture identified.

XR Lumbar Spine: mild straightening noted.

Follow up with physical therapy if symptoms persist.
